creator: peter.thoenen@protonmail.com
text:
Update to latest release.


--------------060501030305000808040801
Content-Type: text/plain;
 name="tor-devel.diff.txt"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: inline;
 filename="tor-devel.diff.txt"

diff -ruN tor-devel.orig/Makefile tor-devel/Makefile
--- tor-devel.orig/Makefile	Mon Oct 15 10:08:15 2007
+++ tor-devel/Makefile	Fri Oct 19 11:31:48 2007
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	tor
-DISTVERSION=	0.2.0.7-alpha
+DISTVERSION=	0.2.0.8-alpha
 CATEGORIES=	security net
 MASTER_SITES=	http://tor.eff.org/dist/ \
 		http://mirror.onionland.org/dist/
diff -ruN tor-devel.orig/distinfo tor-devel/distinfo
--- tor-devel.orig/distinfo	Mon Oct 15 10:08:15 2007
+++ tor-devel/distinfo	Fri Oct 19 11:32:28 2007
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (tor-0.2.0.7-alpha.tar.gz) = 3ff9adcfcfc61293020b3816ff564a98
-SHA256 (tor-0.2.0.7-alpha.tar.gz) = 7e84c2bcd9eebd55b8d853ee3aad5a95071fa050a19e7649cec191802298104b
-SIZE (tor-0.2.0.7-alpha.tar.gz) = 1399183
+MD5 (tor-0.2.0.8-alpha.tar.gz) = ca6c6e5fd822edc3df2e3da1dd71a77a
+SHA256 (tor-0.2.0.8-alpha.tar.gz) = 0022e90f98f009dd74cf0cca8b6714c5d3188126c55e74ad7a03fb36c59adeca
+SIZE (tor-0.2.0.8-alpha.tar.gz) = 1413544

--------------060501030305000808040801--
